text: From the first scene, I sense a modern, almost clinical anticipation. The glass walls and neon lights suggest a place where knowledge is shared and ideas are born, yet the emptiness of the chairs leaves me momentarily suspended between expectation and solitude. In the second scene, surrounded by declarations of research and development, I feel an engaging spark. The colorful environment, the display of words and tools, fill me with curiosity and a sense of collective striving—a playful seriousness, a beckoning to dream and create. Here, the world feels like it is on the cusp of discovery.
